governingPrinciple: Author approval closes the current gate and automatically triggers the next authorized stage; Cody is used only for engineering, remediation, publisher judgment support, or explicitly disclosed bridge execution.
autonomousEditorialLoop: Title advances to the next governed stage
Package is released to the author

cadencePolicy.principle: Execution starts immediately after authorization; author-facing delivery follows a truthful professional cadence for QA, package preparation, and author processing.

executorCertification.currentRuntime: Stage 0 diagnostic components exist; end-to-end automatic title executor is not verified as default
executorCertification.requiredPromotion: Event-triggered Stage 0 execution from approved title state through QA, exception routing, package generation, cadence release, and next gate opening

executorCertification.currentRuntime: Workflow proven by The Intentional Leader; parallel titles are still Cody-assisted bridge execution
executorCertification.requiredPromotion: Automatic CAP-001 executor started by prior gate approval with manuscript processing, QA, package generation, cadence release, and exception routing

executorCertification.currentRuntime: Release and author-review surface deployed; substantive execution remains Cody-assisted bridge
executorCertification.requiredPromotion: Automatic CAP-002 executor started by Developmental approval with line-edit pass, QA, package generation, release cadence, and gate creation

executorCertification.currentRuntime: Author-response recognition and transition were remediated; substantive copyedit remains Cody-assisted bridge
executorCertification.requiredPromotion: Automatic CAP-003 executor started by Line Editing approval with copyedit pass, QA, package generation, release cadence, and gate creation

executorCertification.currentRuntime: Proofreading package delivery and author-review state are deployed; substantive proofreading remains Cody-assisted bridge
executorCertification.requiredPromotion: Automatic CAP-004 executor started by Copyediting approval with proof pass, QA, package generation, release cadence, and gate creation

executorCertification.currentRuntime: QA artifacts exist; independent policy-based QA executor is not verified
executorCertification.requiredPromotion: Policy-based QA runner with pass/fail/exception outcomes and Publisher Today routing

executorCertification.currentRuntime: Packages are generated and registered, but permanent artifact generator runtime is not verified
executorCertification.requiredPromotion: Stage-aware package generator with artifact manifest, SharePoint filing, Core artifact registration, active-stage visibility, and idempotent versioning

executorCertification.currentRuntime: Bounded release action, email relay, and Author Workspace visibility are deployed
executorCertification.requiredPromotion: Cadence scheduler can release approved package automatically when no publisher hold exists

marketingTriggers.action: Create marketing profile and preliminary campaign
Identify audience, positioning, comparable titles, and themes
Generate metadata and SEO working set
Create marketing asset plan and mockup queue
Finalize print specifications used in promotional materials
Start retailer monitoring and preorder workflow
Generate performance review and campaign recommendations

productionDistributionBranches.targetRuntime: System-managed EPUB 3 generation with EPUBCheck and device/render QA
productionDistributionBranches.vellumRole: Fallback, premium manual option, exception path, and commissioning comparison tool

productionDistributionBranches.targetRuntime: Controlled publisher action after title, format, imprint, and publication posture are approved
guards: prevent assignment before imprint and edition decisions
prevent silent replacement of distributed ISBN

productionDistributionBranches.targetRuntime: Governed route matrix by format, rights, territory, commercial terms, and supported integration
productionDistributionBranches.manualFallback: System prepares submission package; publisher completes bounded upload; system records confirmation; retail validation starts automatically

productionDistributionBranches.targetRuntime: Separate audiobook branch covering narration strategy, agreements, audio QA, mastering, distribution, and royalty ingestion
productionDistributionBranches.aiNarrationBoundary: Separate approval required based on rights, author consent, retailer acceptance, disclosure, suitability, quality, cost, and expected sales

productionDistributionBranches.targetRuntime: Distinct production profile with page/spread architecture, illustration brief, art direction, trim/bleed, fixed-layout ebook decision, and child-safety checks

blockedAssumptions.assumption: PublishDrive supports six assets on a free option through API
blockedAssumptions.reason: Current terms must be confirmed before implementing a six-title rotation or API integration.

promotionCriteria: A prior author approval event automatically starts the next authorized stage without a Cody instruction
The next-stage executor records start, processing, QA, exception, package generation, cadence, release, notification, and next gate evidence
Publisher Today shows only true human decisions, external waits, runtime failures, and bridge gaps
The Author Workspace shows truthful current activity while release cadence is running
Package release timing is controlled by configurable cadence policy, not by manual Cody availability
Every bridge process has a named replacement runtime or remains visibly classified as bridge
